content:
Every service ends up with:

• retry

• timeout

• circuit breaker

• fallback

…implemented differently every time.

I built Resili — a TypeScript-first resilience toolkit 👇

import { resili } from "@resili/core";
const client = resili(fetchUser)
.timeout({ milliseconds: 3000 })
.retry({ maxAttempts: 3 })
.circuitBreaker({ minimumThroughput: 10 })
.build();

Enter fullscreen mode

Exit fullscreen mode

TypeScript-first • Fluent API • Production-ready

📦 https://github.com/nkcodedev/resili

Would love feedback from backend/dev folks 👇
